name: team-lead
description: Coordinating a team of Agent-spawned teammates shipping a multi-story epic. Atomic-imperative dispatch pattern, lead-mediated commit serialization protocol (v2 + v3 shared-file ownership), wave-composition heuristics via file-conflict matrix, sandbox-approval handling, common failure modes + recovery. Battle-tested across 21 ships in one session on godot-scenario-harness 2026-05-12. Universal playbook — portable across projects; project-specific lane assignments stay in per-project memory.
